description:
🚀Head to http://squarespace.com/CNCKITCHEN to save 10% off your first purchase of a website or domain using code CNCKITCHEN.

Tired of messy drawers and complicated CAD? I found a free AI tool that automatically generates custom Gridfinity bins from just a photo - no design skills needed! In this video I’ll show you how it works, test it on my own “drawer of shame,” and share tips for making the perfect custom tool storage.

Check out our *CNC Kitchen products* at https://cnckitchen.store/ or at our global resellers https://www.cnckitchen.com/reseller

Try out the AI Gridfinity Generator: https://www.tooltrace.ai

Gridfinity Specification: https://gridfinity.xyz/specification/
Baseplate & Bin Generator (STL): https://gridfinity.perplexinglabs.com/pr/gridfinity-rebuilt/0/0
Gridfinity Generator (also STEP): https://gridfinitygenerator.com/
Engineers get Onshape Professional free up to 6 months: https://onshape.pro/CNCKitchen

Thanks to Mitutoyo for the support over the years!
https://www.mitutoyo.com

💚 Support me 🙏
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/cnckitchen
Join as a YouTube member!
Shop at Matterhackers: http://www.matterhackers.com/?aff=7479
Buy a Bambu Lab printer 🐼: https://geni.us/BambuP1S
Buy a Prusa printer: https://geni.us/CNCKPrusa
PayPal: https://www.paypal.me/CNCKitchen

🎙Check out my Podcast with Thomas Sanladerer: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzUgJrG-w_KQexroYkJR9XQ

Follow me on Twitter: https://twitter.com/cnc_kitchen
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cnckitchenyt

*Chapters*
00:00 Introduction
00:48 Custom Bins
01:36 Drawer of Shame
02:22 What is Gridfinity?
02:45 Bins
03:38 Sponsor
05:11 ToolTrace.AI
07:33 Two Colors
10:28 Slicer Customization
11:21 Installing It (The Best Part!)
12:06 Feature Requests

#3Dprinting #gridfinity #AI
DISCLAIMER: Part of this video was sponsored by Squarespace.
FTC Disclaimer: A percentage of sales is made through Affiliate links
